name: Block Jumper
short_description: Jump, shoot, and duck your way through various assortments of blocks, spikes, and coins alike.
detailed_description:
Jump, shoot, and duck your way through various assortments of blocks, spikes, and coins in this blocky, action platformer.

With 51 levels awaiting you, Block Jumper will hone your platforming skills and eventually push them to their limit.

Can you endure the journey ahead of you? There's only one way to find out.

Gameplay

Block Jumper currently consists of 51 level, each of which increasing in difficulty ranging from Beginner levels all the way up to Advanced and even Expert levels. Each level contains a Coin Token which increases the Gold you obtain for completing the level, but also appears on your Menu to reward your sense of completion.

An Endless Mode is also available for you to tackle, throwing every level in the game at you one after another. You only get one life in each Endless attempt, so if you want a good score, you're going to have to be careful. Additionally, collecting Coin Tokens throughout an Endless run will increase the Gold you obtain when you meet your inevitable demise. How far will you go?

A Cosmetics Shop is also present in the game, taking Gold in exchange for simple Player customisations. Currently this includes changing the color of the Player and the Player's Gun Lasers.

A rather simple, just surprisingly neat little game. Give it a crack, and see what you reckon.
